framework.name: OEE Requires Documented SOPs Per Facility
framework.description: Each manufacturing facility must establish in Standard Operating Procedures exactly how they calculate OEE components, including what counts as downtime, how scrap is measured, and how rework is classified. Changes to methodology must be documented.
framework.raw_quote: main thing is each establishment they may be using slightly different nuances and that should be established in their standard operating procedure

source.title: Let's Learn Food Science - OEE Calculations for Food Manufacturing
